aiCommentCN: 跌的时候想抄底，底还没找到，底就变脸了。
aiCommentEN: Fear of missing out is stronger than fear of losing.
aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
短期内比特币价格可能会继续下跌。
【关键位置】
当前支撑位为65,000美元，阻力位为70,000美元。
【走势推演】
如果价格跌破支撑位，可能会继续下跌至62,000美元。
【一句提醒】
投资者应谨慎操作，关注市场信号。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin price may continue to fall in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
Current support level is $65,000, resistance level is $70,000.
[Outlook]
If the price breaks through the support level, it may continue to fall to $62,000.
[Reminder]
Investors should operate cautiously and pay attention to market signals.
